Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to be followed by Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants where both occur
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled in successful variants versus variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants with multiple approval routing
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to when it is not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to occur after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in high-frequency variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a rejection loop versus linear approval paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to the next rejection activity (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR or Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR measured from its enabling event to its completion across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and the end of the case
